sentences.en: Everyone likes to eat well.
sentences.r: Dàjiā dōu xǐhuan chī de hǎo.

sentences.t: 我知道一个吃饭的好地方。
sentences.en: I know a good spot to eat.
sentences.r: Wǒ zhīdào yí ge chīfàn de hǎo dìfang.

sentences.en: I'm going to buy one for you.
sentences.r: Wǒ gěi nǐ mǎi yí ge.

sentences.en: The train leaves at six.
sentences.r: Huǒchē liù diǎn kāi.

sentences.en: From nine until five.
sentences.r: Cóng jiǔ diǎn dào wǔ diǎn.

sentences.en: The hotel is near downtown.
sentences.r: Jiǔdiàn lí shìzhōngxīn hěn jìn.

sentences.t: 我们需要更多时间把这个做完。
sentences.en: We need more time to finish this.
sentences.r: Wǒmen xūyào gèng duō shíjiān bǎ zhège zuò wán.

sentences.en: They love this city.
sentences.r: Tāmen chāo ài zhè zuò chéngshì.

sentences.t: 你手机借我用一下行吗？
sentences.en: Can I use your phone for a second?
sentences.r: Nǐ shǒujī jiè wǒ yòng yíxià xíng ma?

sentences.en: We really like to travel.
sentences.r: Wǒmen tèbié xǐhuan lǚxíng.

sentences.en: Marco works out with a dictionary.
sentences.r: Marco bàozhe zìdiǎn jiànshēn.

sentences.t: 跟我说说公司发生什么了。
sentences.en: Tell me what happened at work.
sentences.r: Gēn wǒ shuōshuo gōngsī fāshēng shénme le.

sentences.t: 你打算什么时候跟我说那件事？
sentences.en: When were you going to tell me that?
sentences.r: Nǐ dǎsuàn shénme shíhou gēn wǒ shuō nà jiàn shì?

sentences.en: I'm next to the door.
sentences.r: Wǒ zài mén pángbiān.

sentences.en: I'm always home on Sundays.
sentences.r: Wǒ zhōurì zǒngshì zài jiā.

sentences.t: 出租车司机不知道在哪儿。
sentences.en: The taxi driver doesn't know where it is.
sentences.r: Chūzūchē sījī bù zhīdào zài nǎr.

sentences.t: 我们在找一套更大的房子。
sentences.en: We're looking for a bigger house.
sentences.r: Wǒmen zài zhǎo yí tào gèng dà de fángzi.

sentences.t: 我很想学着把饭做得更好。
sentences.en: I'd love to learn to cook better.
sentences.r: Wǒ hěn xiǎng xuézhe bǎ fàn zuò de gèng hǎo.

sentences.en: I'm going to swing by your place.
sentences.r: Wǒ shùnlù qù nǐ jiā yí tàng.

sentences.en: I won't be able to go today.
sentences.r: Wǒ jīntiān qù bu liǎo le.

sentences.en: I asked him and he didn't answer me.
sentences.r: Wǒ wèn tā le, tā méi huí wǒ.

sentences.t: 我跟你说件事：你是对的。
sentences.en: I'll tell you one thing: you were right.
sentences.r: Wǒ gēn nǐ shuō jiàn shì: nǐ shì duì de.

sentences.t: 人家问我为什么学西班牙语。
sentences.en: People ask me why I study Spanish.
sentences.r: Rénjiā wèn wǒ wèishénme xué Xībānyáyǔ.

sentences.en: She never talks about how she feels.
sentences.r: Tā cóng bù tán zìjǐ de gǎnshòu.

sentences.t: 我们找到一个吃饭的好地方。
sentences.en: We found a good place to eat.
sentences.r: Wǒmen zhǎodào yí ge chīfàn de hǎo dìfang.

sentences.t: 你从那儿看得到屏幕吗？
sentences.en: Can you see the screen from there?
sentences.r: Nǐ cóng nàr kàn de dào píngmù ma?

sentences.en: I drink coffee in the morning.
sentences.r: Wǒ zǎoshang hē kāfēi.

sentences.t: 你想再点点别的一起分吗？
sentences.en: Do you want to order something else to share?
sentences.r: Nǐ xiǎng zài diǎn diǎn bié de yìqǐ fēn ma?

sentences.en: The house feels empty without you.
sentences.r: Nǐ bú zài, jiā lǐ kōngdàngdàng de.

sentences.en: The class is at nine.
sentences.r: Kè jiǔ diǎn shàng.

sentences.t: 我花了好多钱买了个特别差的东西。
sentences.en: I paid a lot for something really bad.
sentences.r: Wǒ huā le hǎoduō qián mǎi le ge tèbié chà de dōngxi.

sentences.t: 你能借我点钱，明天还你行吗？
sentences.en: Can you lend me money until tomorrow?
sentences.r: Nǐ néng jiè wǒ diǎn qián, míngtiān huán nǐ xíng ma?

sentences.en: Buy the ticket at the station.
sentences.r: Zài chēzhàn mǎi piào.

sentences.t: 去马德里的火车已经开走了。
sentences.en: The train to Madrid already left.
sentences.r: Qù Mǎdélǐ de huǒchē yǐjīng kāizǒu le.

sentences.en: Look me in the eyes and say it.
sentences.r: Kànzhe wǒ de yǎnjing shuō.

sentences.t: 告诉马可你认识多少单词。
sentences.en: Tell Marco how many words you know.
sentences.r: Gàosu Marco nǐ rènshi duōshao dāncí.

sentences.en: We gave the keys to the neighbor.
sentences.r: Wǒmen bǎ yàoshi gěi línjū le.

sentences.en: Last week I was really busy.
sentences.r: Shàng zhōu wǒ tèbié máng.

sentences.en: I don't have to do anything today.
sentences.r: Wǒ jīntiān shénme dōu bú yòng zuò.

sentences.t: 你不用什么都一个人扛。
sentences.en: You don't have to do everything alone.
sentences.r: Nǐ bú yòng shénme dōu yí ge rén káng.

sentences.en: Let's go home, it's already late.
sentences.r: Wǒmen huíjiā ba, yǐjīng wǎn le.

sentences.t: 今天我不想工作，我想睡觉。
sentences.en: Today I don't want to work, I want to sleep.
sentences.r: Jīntiān wǒ bù xiǎng gōngzuò, wǒ xiǎng shuìjiào.

sentences.en: I think I feel better already.
sentences.r: Wǒ juéde wǒ yǐjīng hǎo diǎn le.

sentences.en: I want a little more, please.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng zài yào yìdiǎn, xièxie.

sentences.en: The doctor says I'm fine.
sentences.r: Yīshēng shuō wǒ méishì.

sentences.en: Who says how I have to talk?
sentences.r: Shéi guīdìng wǒ gāi zěnme shuōhuà?

sentences.en: I'd like a coffee, please.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng yào bēi kāfēi, xièxie.

sentences.en: I haven't seen you in a while.
sentences.r: Wǒ hǎojiǔ méi jiàn nǐ le.

sentences.en: I've been studying Spanish for two years.
sentences.r: Wǒ xué Xībānyáyǔ liǎng nián le.

sentences.t: 我特别开心，因为跟你一起去了。
sentences.en: I was really happy because I went with you.
sentences.r: Wǒ tèbié kāixīn, yīnwèi gēn nǐ yìqǐ qù le.

sentences.en: A table for two, please.
sentences.r: Liǎng wèi de zhuōzi, máfan le.

sentences.en: Yes, this bus goes downtown.
sentences.r: Duì, zhè tàng gōngjiāo qù shìzhōngxīn.

sentences.en: Today it's hotter than yesterday.
sentences.r: Jīntiān bǐ zuótiān gèng rè.

sentences.t: 我不知道现在几点，抱歉。
sentences.en: I don't know what time it is, sorry.
sentences.r: Wǒ bù zhīdào xiànzài jǐ diǎn, bàoqiàn.

sentences.en: Stop the taxi here, please.
sentences.r: Zài zhèr tíngchē, máfan le.

sentences.en: After eating, I always want to sleep.
sentences.r: Chī wán fàn wǒ zǒngshì xiǎng shuìjiào.

sentences.t: 我们明天恐怕得再来一趟。
sentences.en: We're going to have to come back tomorrow.
sentences.r: Wǒmen míngtiān kǒngpà děi zài lái yí tàng.

sentences.en: Today I have less time than yesterday.
sentences.r: Wǒ jīntiān bǐ zuótiān shíjiān shǎo.

sentences.en: The food is really good, thanks.
sentences.r: Cài zhēn hǎochī, xièxie.

sentences.en: Walk, it's very close.
sentences.r: Zǒulù ba, hěn jìn de.

sentences.en: It's close, two minutes on foot.
sentences.r: Hěn jìn, zǒulù liǎng fēnzhōng.

sentences.en: Go by bus, it's faster.
sentences.r: Zuò gōngjiāo ba, gèng kuài.

sentences.en: You have to practice every day.
sentences.r: Nǐ děi měitiān liànxí.

sentences.t: 我喜欢这地方，还想再来。
sentences.en: I like this place; I want to come back.
sentences.r: Wǒ xǐhuan zhè dìfang, hái xiǎng zài lái.

sentences.en: I'm going to get there before you.
sentences.r: Wǒ huì bǐ nǐ xiān dào.

sentences.t: 我去了，因为你让我去的。
sentences.en: I went because you told me to.
sentences.r: Wǒ qù le, yīnwèi nǐ ràng wǒ qù de.

sentences.en: Today I'm not busy, I'm free.
sentences.r: Wǒ jīntiān bù máng, wǒ yǒu kòng.

sentences.en: I know that you know that person.
sentences.r: Wǒ zhīdào nǐ rènshi nàge rén.

sentences.en: You have to be patient with this.
sentences.r: Zhè shì nǐ děi yǒu nàixīn.

sentences.en: I think we're going the wrong way.
sentences.r: Wǒ juéde wǒmen zǒu cuò lù le.

sentences.en: No, that bus doesn't go there.
sentences.r: Bù, nà tàng gōngjiāo bú qù nàr.

sentences.en: I didn't go because I didn't have time.
sentences.r: Wǒ méi qù, yīnwèi wǒ méi shíjiān.

sentences.en: You should think before you speak.
sentences.r: Nǐ yīnggāi xiān xiǎngxiang zài shuōhuà.

sentences.en: I have to call my mom.
sentences.r: Wǒ děi gěi wǒ mā dǎ diànhuà.

sentences.en: You have to call your mom.
sentences.r: Nǐ děi gěi nǐ mā dǎ diànhuà.

sentences.en: You do what you can.
sentences.r: Nǐ jìnlì jiù hǎo.

sentences.t: 我洗澡、穿衣服、然后出门。
sentences.en: I shower, get dressed, and head out.
sentences.r: Wǒ xǐzǎo、chuān yīfu、ránhòu chūmén.

sentences.t: 能给我们拿一下账单吗，谢谢。
sentences.en: Can you bring us the check, please?
sentences.r: Néng gěi wǒmen ná yíxià zhàngdān ma, xièxie.

sentences.en: After the square, it's close.
sentences.r: Guò le guǎngchǎng jiù hěn jìn le.

sentences.en: I'm not angry, I'm just tired.
sentences.r: Wǒ méi shēngqì, jiùshì lèi le.

sentences.t: 你特别喜欢巧克力，对吧？
sentences.en: You really like chocolate, don't you?
sentences.r: Nǐ tèbié xǐhuan qiǎokèlì, duì ba?

sentences.en: I'll do it, don't worry.
sentences.r: Wǒ huì zuò de, bié dānxīn.

sentences.en: It's not expensive, don't worry.
sentences.r: Bú guì, bié dānxīn.

sentences.t: 你刚才说你要做什么来着？
sentences.en: What did you say you were going to do?
sentences.r: Nǐ gāngcái shuō nǐ yào zuò shénme láizhe?

sentences.en: Don't walk, it's far.
sentences.r: Bié zǒulù, tài yuǎn le.

sentences.t: 不好意思，这火车去马德里吗？
sentences.en: Excuse me, does the train go to Madrid?
sentences.r: Bù hǎoyìsi, zhè huǒchē qù Mǎdélǐ ma?

sentences.en: I'm taking a taxi because I have suitcases.
sentences.r: Wǒ yǒu xínglixiāng, suǒyǐ dǎchē.

sentences.en: As a kid, I didn't like studying.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎoshíhou bù xǐhuan xuéxí.

sentences.en: I don't think it's that hard.
sentences.r: Wǒ juéde méi nàme nán.

sentences.t: 这是安娜，我的一个朋友。
sentences.en: This is Ana, a friend of mine.
sentences.r: Zhè shì Ānnà, wǒ de yí ge péngyou.

sentences.t: 很高兴认识你，你叫什么名字？
sentences.en: Nice to meet you, what's your name?
sentences.r: Hěn gāoxìng rènshi nǐ, nǐ jiào shénme míngzi?

sentences.t: 我不喜欢跑步，我更喜欢走路。
sentences.en: I don't like running; I prefer walking.
sentences.r: Wǒ bù xǐhuan pǎobù, wǒ gèng xǐhuan zǒulù.

sentences.en: I want you to come to my house.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng ràng nǐ lái wǒ jiā.
